reviews.review_description: I had a lot of fun playing, and got to meet some of the dev team, my only issue was that I couldn't join the discord and it's laggy when there are a few people in a code, but other than that really fun.

reviews.review_title: This game is great but one problem
reviews.review_description: I love this game and I can tell that this game was released recently because there is a free beta tester badge and I’ve never seen it before but the problem is that sometimes when I spawn in a map I fall out of the map I was supposed to go into but I still think this game is great and it’s also pretty rare for me to fall out of the map and Its like gorilla tag but when it first released no slippery walls and bad textures but textures aren’t the problem.
I wanna make videos abt this game if it becomes more popular or more active cuz im the only one online sometimes
this game is really good the made it nice I like the style and everything
Exactly when I downloaded it I’m at the owner. We had a great time playing the game ￼
